productDisplayName: Nike Men Printed Blur Face Black T-shirt
description: Style Note This tee is made of fabric engineered to the exact specifications of championship athletes - Dri-Fit fabric pulls sweat away from your skin to help you keep dry and comfortable even when you're playing active Sports. From nike's basketball range, stylish enough to wear both on and off the court. Product Details Black T-shirt with a round neck, short sleeves, Nike logo on the left chest, engineered with Dri-fit technology and rubber print on the front Material and Care 60% cotton and 40% polyester Machine wash cool with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron do not iron on decorations
